name: workhub-marketplace
description: Claude Code marketplace bundled with the workhub app: the single source of plugins for the workhub vault harness (task board, engineering workflows, productivity tools, and tech-stack helpers). See docs/plugins.md for the required/optional and scope policy.

plugins.name: workhub
plugins.description: Task-board skills and hooks for the workhub vault (task-list, task-start, task-report, vault-init).

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Engineering utilities and helpers for software development tasks.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Productivity helpers for administrative and daily tasks.

plugins.name: scrum
plugins.description: Helpers for scrum and agile development workflows, including monday.com backlog and Google Drive doc integration.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Helpers for working with Obsidian notes and knowledge management.

plugins.name: stack-cloudflare
plugins.description: Helpers for developing on Cloudflare (Workers, Pages, R2, D1, etc.).

plugins.name: stack-dnd-kit
plugins.description: Helpers for building drag-and-drop UIs with dnd kit.

plugins.name: stack-opencode
plugins.description: Helpers for working with OpenCode configuration and extensions.

plugins.name: stack-react-router
plugins.description: Helpers for React Router and Remix applications.
